subject: [PATCH v4 4/5] mm/memcontrol: convert memcg to use page_counter_stock

2026-06-23.patch_summary: This patch converts memcg (memory cgroup) to use page_counter_stock, which simplifies the handling of memory stock and reduces unnecessary work when refilling the stock. The changes include removing special casing for !allow_spinning check, allowing page_counter_alloc_stock() to fail if there's not enough memory, and updating drain_all_stock and memcg_hotplug_cpu_dead functions to use the new page_counter stock drain variant. As a result, memsw and memory page counters now have independent stocks, which can lead to transient discrepancies in reported usage.
